title: ACI 360 R-06 Slab on Grade Design
description: Design a slab on grade in accordance with ACI 360 R-06.

s3d_section.description: Section ID. Symbol: Section. Section object imported from S3D model.

nl.description: No. of Beam Along L (nl). Symbol: n_{l}

nb.description: No. of Beam Along B (nb). Symbol: n_{n}

q_allow.description: Allowable Bearing Pressure (qallow). Symbol: q_{allow}. Units: psf

delta.description: Expected Settlement (δ). Symbol: δ. Units: in

e_mcenter.description: Center Moisture (emcenter). Symbol: e_{mcenter}. Units: ft. Edge moisture variation distance for center lift.

e_medge.description: Edge Moisture (emedge). Symbol: e_{medge}. Units: ft. Edge moisture variation distance for edge lift.

y_mcenter.description: Differential Center Movement (ymcenter). Symbol: y_{mcenter}. Units: in. Differential soil movement for center lift.

y_medge.description: Differential Edge Movement (ymedge). Symbol: y_{medge}. Units: in. Differential soil movement for edge lift.

C_deltaL.description: CΔL. Symbol: C_{ΔL}. Allowable differential deflection ratio in L direction.

C_deltaB.description: CΔB. Symbol: C_{ΔB}. Allowable differential deflection ratio in B direction.

C_deltaLc.description: CΔLc. Symbol: C_{ΔLc}. Allowable differential deflection ratio for center lift in L direction.

C_deltaBc.description: CΔBc. Symbol: C_{ΔBc}. Allowable differential deflection ratio for center lift in B direction.

C_deltaLe.description: CΔLe. Symbol: C_{ΔLe}. Allowable differential deflection ratio for edge lift in L direction.

C_deltaBe.description: CΔBe. Symbol: C_{ΔBe}. Allowable differential deflection ratio for edge in B direction.

fc.description: Compressive Strength of Concrete (fc). Symbol: f_{c}. Units: ksi

fs.description: Yield Stress of Reinforcement (fs). Symbol: f_{s}. Units: ksi

Es.description: Modulus of Elasticity of Soil (Es). Symbol: E_{s}. Units: ksi

Sbr.description: Bar Diameter (Sbr). Symbol: S_{br}. Bar diameter of stiffening beam.

n_bar.description: Number of Bars (nbar). Symbol: n_{bar}. Number of bars of stiffening beam.

dbs.description: Bar Diameter of Slab (dbs). Symbol: d_{bs}

Sr.description: Rebar Spacing of Slab (Sr). Symbol: S_{r}. Units: in

P.description: Perimeter Loading (P). Units: lb/ft. Perimeter load expected on slab on the periphery.

Pb.description: Max Bearing Loading (Pb). Symbol: P_{b}. Units: lb/ft

DL.description: Superimposed Dead Load (DL). Symbol: DL. Units: psf. Superimposed dead load expected on slab.

LL.description: Live Load (LL). Symbol: LL. Units: psf. Live load expected on slab.

uid.description: Calculator unique identifier — must match the endpoint uid.

current_unit_system.description: Unit system for input values and output display.

project_details.description: Optional project metadata for the PDF report header.
